title: Hugo's Rainbow Snacks
synopsis: Hugo discovers colorful foods and learns about colors through eating delicious snacks in a joyful, sensory exploration.

pages.text: Hugo is hungry! He looks at his plate.

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes sits at a colorful table with rainbow paint splatters and drips around him, dominant yellow color scheme, finger paint aesthetic, joyful pure color exploration
illustration.alt: Hugo sitting at a bright yellow table looking at his plate

pages.text: Red strawberries! Hugo picks one up. Yum!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes holding a bright red strawberry, dominant red color with paint splatter drips, splashy painterly style, sensory visual, joyful pure color exploration
illustration.alt: Hugo holding a red strawberry with red paint splatters around

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes eating orange carrots, dominant orange color scheme, paint splatter drips, finger paint aesthetic, splashy painterly, sensory visual exploration
illustration.alt: Hugo crunching orange carrots with orange paint effects

pages.text: Yellow banana! Hugo peels it carefully.

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes peeling a yellow banana, dominant yellow color with paint splatter drips, rainbow colors, splashy painterly, joyful pure color, finger paint aesthetic
illustration.alt: Hugo peeling a bright yellow banana

pages.text: Green grapes! Pop, pop, pop in his mouth!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes eating green grapes, dominant green color scheme, paint splatter drips, sensory visual, splashy painterly, color exploration, finger paint aesthetic
illustration.alt: Hugo eating green grapes with green paint splatters

pages.text: Blue blueberries! So tiny and sweet!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes with blue blueberries, dominant blue color with paint splatter drips, rainbow colors, joyful pure color, splashy painterly, finger paint aesthetic
illustration.alt: Hugo with blue blueberries and blue paint effects

pages.text: Purple plums! Hugo takes a big bite!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes biting a purple plum, dominant purple color scheme, paint splatter drips, sensory visual, splashy painterly, color exploration, finger paint aesthetic
illustration.alt: Hugo taking a bite of a purple plum

pages.text: Hugo's tummy is happy! Rainbow colors everywhere!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes surrounded by all the colorful foods, rainbow colors dominant, paint splatter drips everywhere, splashy painterly, joyful pure color, finger paint aesthetic, sensory visual exploration
illustration.alt: Hugo surrounded by colorful foods with rainbow paint splatters

metadata.illustrationStyle: rainbow colors, splashy painterly, one color dominant per scene, paint splatter drips, sensory visual, joyful pure color, finger paint aesthetic, color exploration

questions.question: What color are the strawberries Hugo eats?
questions.explanation: Strawberries are red! Hugo picked up the red strawberries.

questions.question: What does Hugo do with the banana?
questions.explanation: Hugo peels the yellow banana carefully before eating it.

questions.question: How does Hugo feel at the end?
questions.explanation: Hugo's tummy is happy after eating all the colorful foods!
